emails.subject: ISDA Master Documentation Workshop
emails.body: ISDA Master Documentation Workshop Are either of you aware of any master documentation workshops being offered in NYC or London in the next few months that would be worthwhile for Jane McBride to attend? I remember several years ago going to a program that Euromoney (or Eurocurrency) put on for 2-days focusing on ISDA's. Please advise. Thanks.

emails.subject: ISDA Master Documentation Workshop
emails.body: ISDA Master Documentation Workshop Are either of you aware of any master documentation workshops being offered in NYC or London in the next few months that would be worthwhile for Jane McBride to attend? I remember several years ago going to a program that Euromoney (or Eurocurrency) put on for 2-days focusing on ISDA's. Please advise. Thanks.

emails.subject: Re: ISDA Master Documentation Workshop
emails.body: Re: ISDA Master Documentation Workshop Euromoney stopped doing their great seminar a few years back. We have not yet found any other seminar that equals it. I'll keep my eyes posted, though. Alan Aronowitz 10/25/2000 04:16 PM

emails.subject: Re: ISDA Master Documentation Workshop

emails.subject: Re: ISDA Master Documentation Workshop
emails.body: My materials are 6 years old. Do you think they would be of any benefit? Alan Aronowitz 10/25/2000 05:26 PM
